report.hierarchy_change: Primary left-column object is now a live monitor view centered on hybrid position+game cards, with a compact accounting strip above it. Trade log remains available but is explicitly secondary inside the drawer.
live_game_focus_improved: main section renamed and framed as 'Live Monitor'
active cards remain game-context-aware through matchup + live game status pill
bet side is now explicit in the card title as WIN/LOSE plus backed target
current price, committed capital, live equity, and unrealized PnL are surfaced together for monitoring
trade_log_dominance_reduced: trade log kept inside secondary drawer/tab space
trade tab explicitly labeled as secondary history
primary screen real estate now prioritizes live monitor cards and accounting strip
side_price_pnl_accounting_clarity_fixed: exact side made explicit via WIN/LOSE pill and title
entry and current price shown for the same real executed position
capital committed shown from actual qty * entry_px
live equity shown from actual qty * current_price when available
unrealized PnL remains based on actual trade basis
available cash vs capital in trades added from backend bankroll fields

backend_addition.source: computed from live open trades in trades_sports.db without changing execution logic

notes: Truth model preserved: main positions still come from real open paper trades only.
No model, strategy, or execution logic was changed.
